'''Vandro''' was the heavy weaponry and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] specialist of the [[Katarn Commandos]] which was lead by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]. He was part of the assault team assigned to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s stronghold on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].
